name: start_life_event_change
description: Initiates a Qualified Life Event (QLE) process for an employee to make changes to their benefits.

requiredFields.name: event_type
requiredFields.label: Life Event Type
requiredFields.description: The type of qualifying life event that occurred.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Event
requiredFields.description: The date the life event occurred (e.g., date of marriage, date of birth).

confirmationMessage: You are about to start a life event change for a '[event_type]' that occurred on [event_date]. This will open a 30-day window to submit changes and required documents. Do you want to proceed?
successMessage: Successfully started your life event change. Please upload the required documents and make your benefit elections in the system.

name: upload_qle_document
description: Uploads a supporting document for an active Qualified Life Event.

requiredFields.name: event_id
requiredFields.label: Life Event ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the life event you are uploading a document for.

requiredFields.name: document_type
requiredFields.label: Document Type
options: Coverage termination letter or COBRA notice
requiredFields.description: The type of document you are uploading.

requiredFields.name: file_name
requiredFields.label: File Name
requiredFields.description: The name of the file being uploaded (e.g., 'marriage_cert.pdf').

confirmationMessage: You are about to upload '[file_name]' as a '[document_type]' for your life event. Continue?
successMessage: Successfully uploaded '[file_name]'. Your document is now attached to the life event for review.

name: add_dependent
description: Adds a new dependent (e.g., spouse, child) to the employee's profile.

requiredFields.name: first_name
requiredFields.label: First Name
requiredFields.description: The legal first name of the dependent.

requiredFields.name: last_name
requiredFields.label: Last Name
requiredFields.description: The legal last name of the dependent.

confirmationMessage: You are about to add [first_name] [last_name] as a dependent with a relationship of '[relationship]'. Is this correct?
successMessage: Successfully added [first_name] [last_name] to your profile. You can now enroll them in benefits during your life event or open enrollment.

name: remove_dependent
description: Removes a dependent from the employee's profile and benefits coverage.

requiredFields.name: dependent_id
requiredFields.label: Dependent to Remove
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier of the dependent to be removed.

requiredFields.name: reason_for_removal
requiredFields.label: Reason for Removal
requiredFields.description: The reason this dependent is being removed.

confirmationMessage: You are about to remove the selected dependent from your profile. This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?
successMessage: Successfully removed the dependent. Their benefits coverage will end according to policy rules.

name: update_address
description: Updates the employee's home or mailing address on file.

requiredFields.name: address_line_1
requiredFields.label: Address Line 1
requiredFields.description: Street address, P.O. box, company name, c/o

requiredFields.name: effective_date
requiredFields.label: Effective Date
requiredFields.description: The date this address change should take effect.

confirmationMessage: You are about to update your address to [address_line_1], [city], [state] [zip_code], effective [effective_date]. Proceed?
successMessage: Your address has been successfully updated. If this move makes you eligible for new benefits, you may need to start a 'Move' life event.

name: escalate_to_hr
description: Creates a support ticket and escalates the user's request to the HR/Benefits team for manual review.

requiredFields.name: reason_for_escalation
requiredFields.label: Reason for Escalation
requiredFields.description: A brief, one-sentence reason for the escalation (e.g., 'Event date is outside the 30-day window').

requiredFields.name: summary_of_request
requiredFields.label: Summary of Request
requiredFields.description: A detailed summary of the employee's situation and question for the HR team.

confirmationMessage: This will create a ticket for the HR/Benefits team to review your case. Are you sure you want to escalate?
successMessage: Your request has been sent to the HR/Benefits team. They will contact you via email within 2 business days. Your ticket number is HR-TICKET-789123.
